items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 225 distinct venues!

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 305 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 62!
It's time for Summer! It's that time of year where you hit the beach and crack open your favorite Summer brew! That's at least 5 different Summer beers try 5 more for Level 2!
Keep the party rolling all day long with your favorite low ABV session IPAs. That's 5 different beers with style of IPA - Session. Try 5 more for Level 2!
It's time for Summer! It's that time of year where you hit the beach and crack open your favorite Summer brew! That's at least 15 different Summer beers! Try 5 more for Level 4!

user.bio:
Ingress ENL agent. 
I want to drink beer all over the world!

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 70 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 15!

items.checkin_comment: Hoppy feel with a touch of passionfruit.

user.bio: Drinky drinky, time for less thinky.

items.checkin_comment: Has mango undertones my favorite so far of the pickled monkey selection ￼

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 440 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 89!

We believe in IPA and you should too. You certainly have a taste for the hops! That's 280 different IPAs. Try 5 more for Level 57! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

beer.beer_name: Hopsassin's Creed w/ Yirgacheffe Coffee & Mosaic Hops
